body.purpose: Navigation tabs, parameter controls, settings inputs.

mono.purpose: Trace timestamps, log table rows, raw code parameters.

shadows.name: ambient-popover
shadows.purpose: Floating context tooltips and dropdown overlay menus.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action triggers, configurations load, or sessions exports.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f0883e; color: #060a0f; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; padding: 6px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f5a36c; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f0883e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Regex capture fields, SLA timers, search inputs, and filters text box.
components.css: .ds-input-text { background: #0d1117; color: #f0f6fc; border: 1px solid #30363d; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 10px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-input-text::placeholder { color: #8b949e; } .ds-input-text:focus { border-color: #f0883e; outline: none; }

components.name: View Selector Tab
components.description: Interactive selectors toggling between Gantt, Tree, Stats, and Swimlane layouts.
components.css: .ds-tab-container { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; padding: 2px; background: #0d1117; border: 1px solid #30363d; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-tab { background: transparent; color: #8b949e; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 4px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-tab.active { background: #161b22; color: #f0f6fc; } .ds-tab:hover:not(.active) { color: #f0f6fc; }

narrative.overview: LogLens is built to look like a terminal-adjacent, low-chrome dark dashboard focused entirely on high information density, clear grids, and immediate utility. Visual styling should be highly professional, avoiding decorative elements and emphasizing a private, local-first environment for developers and SREs.
keyCharacteristics: Zero Decorative Noise: Every border, outline, and background shift must serve a structural or interactive purpose.
High Information Density: Sizing and spacing are compact, designed to display thousands of log messages and complex Gantt timelines without wasting vertical viewport space.
Theme-Agnostic Structure: Dark mode is the primary console layout, but the visual hierarchy maps 1:1 onto a clean, high-contrast light mode.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent colors (Amber, Blue, Green, Red) must never cover more than 10% of any given viewport surface area. Their primary purpose is diagnostic feedback.

rules.name: The Monospace Code Rule
rules.body: Any string output that originates from a log stream, regex pattern, or LQL query statement must be strictly wrapped in a monospaced font block to preserve horizontal indentation and parsing alignment.

rules.name: The Flat-First Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are completely flat at rest. Drop shadows are only permitted on floating elements, such as dropdown menus, help popovers, and modal dialog overlays.

dos: Do respect the 10% accent rule: keep visual prominence focused on log data rows, not colored header panels.
Do use strict variable mappings (var(--bg-0) to var(--bg-4)) to ensure instant theme toggling works reliably.
Do outline form items with visible keyboard focus rings.
donts: Don't use glowing neon gradients, purple shadows, or frosted glass panels that evoke a generic consumer-facing SaaS layout.
Don't insert margin spacing exceeding 16px around log panels, as space must be optimized for developer timeline density.
Don't hide critical help hints inside submenus; use inline context tooltips (?) beside controls.
